name: launch
tagline: Launches an isolated Code OSS (VS Code) dev build with unique debug ports for Playwright UI driving and dap-cli debugging.
verdict: Detailed, actionable dev-tooling skill: concrete commands, disclosed side effects, well-scoped cleanup of its own throwaway temp dirs, and a thorough troubleshooting section. Weak spots: no versioning signal, and it points users to an unpinned third-party GitHub tool (dap-cli) for optional debugging.

highlights.summary: Line 275: 'prompt the user to install it from https://github.com/roblourens/dap-cli' — unpinned personal-repo tool, no verification or version pin.
Line 1: no version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
